<!-- What should have happened -->

<!-- What actually happened -->

## Environment

## Severity
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — app is broken / data loss
- [ ] 🟠 High — major feature not working
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — feature partially broken
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor UI issue
